title: Service Revenue (Cash)
explanation: Record revenue when cash is received
gaap_note: ASC 606: Revenue recognized when performance obligation satisfied

title: Service Revenue (On Credit)
content:
DR Accounts Receivable $1,000
   CR Service Revenue $1,000
explanation: Record revenue when service performed but cash not yet received
gaap_note: Accrual accounting requires revenue recognition when earned

title: Depreciation (Straight-Line)
content:
DR Depreciation Expense $1,000
   CR Accumulated Depreciation $1,000
explanation: Monthly depreciation on equipment ($120,000 cost, 10 year life)
gaap_note: ASC 360: Depreciation systematically allocates asset cost

title: Accrued Salaries
content:
DR Salaries Expense $5,000
   CR Salaries Payable $5,000
explanation: Accrue salaries earned but not yet paid at month-end
gaap_note: Matching principle: record expense in period incurred

title: Prepaid Rent Adjustment
content:
DR Rent Expense $2,000
   CR Prepaid Rent $2,000
explanation: Monthly adjustment for prepaid rent ($24,000 paid for 12 months)

title: Bad Debt Expense (Allowance Method)
content:
DR Bad Debt Expense $1,500
   CR Allowance for Doubtful Accounts $1,500
explanation: Estimate uncollectible accounts (3% of $50,000 credit sales)
gaap_note: ASC 310: Allowance method required for GAAP

title: Cost of Goods Sold
content:
DR Cost of Goods Sold $6,000
   CR Inventory $6,000
gaap_note: Matching principle: expense matched to revenue
